roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: FUGITIVE ID HEARING/X: INSPECTOR PATRICK CADIGAN APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PEOPLE,/INVOFF:SFPD INSPECTOR EILEEN MURPHY/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD INSPECTOR PATRICK CADIGAN/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD FINGERPRINT TECH, RENEE RODRIQUEZ/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S #1) MULTI-PAGE DOCUMENT (COPY OF WARRANT FROM TEXAS & PRE-SIGNED WAIVER OF EXTRADITION/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S #2) MULTI-PAGE DOCUMENT (CERTIFIED FINGERPRINT COMPARISON PACKET)/DEF: CHALLENGES JUDGE SUZANNE BOLANOS, PURS TO CCP 170,6/MO DENIED/X: MOTION DENIED ON THE GROUNDS THAT THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY/DEF:MOTION TO DISMISS THIS MATTER DUE TO VIOLATION OF THETEN DAY RULE IS DENIED; COURT STATES ITS REASON FOR THE RULING ON THE RECORD/X: COURT DEEMS THAT THE PEOPLE HAVE MET THEIR BURDEN AND THAT THE DEFENDANT IS THE PERSON NAMED ON THE WARRANT, /X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT/
